items.title_en: Charles Schwab to launch direct bitcoin, ethereum trading to compete with Robinhood
items.title_zh: 嘉信理财将推出直接比特币、以太坊交易，与 Robinhood 竞争
items.desc_en: Charles Schwab is rolling out crypto trading, allowing clients to buy bitcoin and ether through a new arm called Schwab Crypto.
items.desc_zh: 嘉信理财 (Charles Schwab) 正在推出加密货币交易，允许客户通过名为 Schwab Crypto 的新部门购买比特币和以太坊。

items.title_en: TSMC and ASML post-earnings stock moves could be a sign of what's to come from chip companies
items.title_zh: 台积电和阿斯麦财报后的股价走势可能预示着芯片公司的未来
items.desc_en: Two of the biggest chipmakers, TSMC and ASML, failed to catch major tailwinds from strong earnings. It could be a bellwether for the chip industry as a whole.
items.desc_zh: 台积电和阿斯麦这两家最大的芯片制造商未能从强劲的盈利中获得主要推动力。它可能成为整个芯片行业的风向标。

items.title_en: One AI networking stock has doubled this year. Bank of America says there's more to go
items.title_zh: 一只人工智能网络股票今年已经翻了一番。美国银行表示还有更多工作要做
items.desc_en: Ciena Corp., which has already doubled in 2026 after nearly tripling in 2025, is benefiting from high demand and growing market share, the bank said.
items.desc_zh: 该银行表示，Ciena Corp. 受益于高需求和不断增长的市场份额，在 2025 年增长近两倍后，到 2026 年已经翻了一番。

items.title_en: Ex-keeper Manninger dies after car hit by train
items.title_zh: 前守门员曼宁格汽车被火车撞死
items.desc_en: Former Arsenal goalkeeper Alex Manninger dies at the age of 48 after his car is struck by a train.
items.desc_zh: 前阿森纳门将亚历克斯·曼宁格 (Alex Manninger) 的汽车被火车撞死，享年 48 岁。

items.title_en: World's biggest chocolate maker issues profit warning as cocoa prices collapse; shares plunge 17%
items.title_zh: 随着可可价格暴跌，全球最大的巧克力制造商发布盈利预警；股价暴跌17%
items.desc_en: Swiss chocolate maker Barry Callebaut on Thursday lowered its operating profit outlook, citing supply concerns and industry overcapacity.
items.desc_zh: 瑞士巧克力制造商百乐嘉利宝周四下调了营业利润预期，理由是供应担忧和行业产能过剩。

items.title_en: Airline CEOs urged by lawmaker to lower fares if fuel prices come down
items.title_zh: 立法者敦促航空公司首席执行官在燃油价格下降的情况下降低票价
items.desc_en: Airlines have raised airfare, fuel surcharges and baggage fees this year to help cover a surge in fuel costs since the Iran war started on Feb. 28.
items.desc_zh: 今年，航空公司提高了机票价格、燃油附加费和行李费，以帮助应对自 2 月 28 日伊朗战争爆发以来飙升的燃油成本。

items.title_en: U.S. Navy stopped 13 ships from passing Iranian port blockade, Pentagon says
items.title_zh: 五角大楼称，美国海军阻止13艘船只通过伊朗港口封锁
items.desc_en: The U.S. has signaled optimism about the prospect of reaching a diplomatic end to the Iran war.
items.desc_zh: 美国对通过外交方式结束伊朗战争的前景表示乐观。

items.title_en: Goldman Sachs bond traders stumbled as Wall Street rivals thrived: 'A fire is being lit under' them
